form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 13 at this track in the G3 December 27 over 1000m, 9 len behind Taxi To The Moon carrying 55.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at this track November 1 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Cosmic Star with 58.5kg at $5.50. May need the run.

form.formComment: Comes off a 50 day let-up. Most recently 8th of 12 at this track in the G3 Sycamore Sprint on February 21 over 1100m, 4 len behind Miami Mountain with 58kg at $17. The race before that came home strongly from last on the turn and won by 4 len at Vaal February 10 over 1000m defeating Alpine Jet with 59kg at $5.50. Can improve on recent efforts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Vaal January 22 over 1450m, 11 len behind Tin Pan Alley with 56kg at $41. Previously first up; tenth of 12 at this track March 16 2024 over 1400m, 17 len behind Texas Red with 50kg at $76. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 11 at this track in G3 on March 21 over 1160m, 2.25 len behind Perfect Miracle carrying 58kg at $5.50. Before that 3rd in a small field at this track on March 7 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Precocious with 60kg at $3.30. Just missed the frame in stakes class latest. Has good form for this and will go close.
